name: 撕毀照片/文件
description: 撕毀全家福照片是對虛假家庭關係的象徵性破壞。撕裂的動作和聲音具有強烈的破壞性美感，代表關係的徹底斷裂。
tags: 照片碎片飛散+眾人震驚+女主冷靜的表情對比

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Ning baby. Dad, mom, family portrait, housekeeper's daughter. How sweetly she smiles. ... What are you doing? I just wanted to remind you I am the Foo family's only biological daughter.
examples.context: 照片碎片飛散+眾人震驚+女主冷靜的表情對比
